steps.title: Identify the added detail
steps.content: After "species," the phrase beginning "the former" explains where each specimen is preserved. That phrase is not an independent clause because it has no verb.

steps.title: Attach the appositive phrase
steps.content: A comma correctly attaches the explanatory phrase to the main sentence. The phrase supplies extra placement details for the two preserved specimens. B adds an unnecessary conjunction, while C and D create a fragment after a period or semicolon. The answer is A.
